info.name: beeSuite Consolidated API
info.description:
Consolidated Postman collection for all beeSuite services

## Services Included:
- eLeave Core (Port 3000) - Leave Management System
- eLeave Tenant (Port 3001) - Multi-tenant Management
- beeWhere (Port 3002) - Attendance & Workforce
- eLeave Login (Port 3003) - Authentication Service
- Beescheduler (Port 3004) - Scheduling System
- eLeave WooCommerce (Port 3005) - WooCommerce Integration

## Pre-request Scripts:
- All authentication requests automatically encode passwords with base64
- All protected endpoints check for valid access token
- Token extraction from login responses

## Post-response Scripts:
- Login responses automatically extract and store access tokens
- Token validation for protected endpoints

## Environment Variables:
- `base_url`: Default API base URL (use environment-specific URLs)
- `access_token`: JWT token for authenticated requests
- `eleave_core_url`: http://localhost:3000
- `eleave_tenant_url`: http://localhost:3001
- `beewhere_url`: http://localhost:3002
- `eleave_login_url`: http://localhost:3003
- `beescheduler_url`: http://localhost:3004
- `eleave_woocommerce_url`: http://localhost:3005

exec: // Set base URL from environment if not already set
// Encode password with base64 if present in request body
// Body is not JSON or doesn't need processing
// Log response time for all requests
